use_cases: Portfolio website skill showcase for designers and developers
Professional profile expertise section displaying competency levels
Team member skills overview for agency or agency-style landing pages
Resume-style skills visualization for personal branding sites
ai_summary: A professional skills showcase component displaying expertise areas with animated hover interactions. Features smooth cubic-bezier transitions, subtle background color changes on hover, and animated accent bars. Clean minimalist design suitable for portfolios, agency sites, and professional profiles with a focus on clean typography and subtle motion.
